news.t: Best Preferred Stock ETFs for Q1 2021

overview.description: The Innovator S&P Investment Grade Preferred ETF (EPRF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index composed of U.S.-listed, investment grade, fixed-rate preferred issues, with a modified equal weighting. EPRF was launched on May 24, 2016 and is issued by Innovator.
infoTable: S&P U.S. High Quality Preferred Stock Index

data.title: Best Preferred Stock ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best preferred stock ETFs for Q1 2021 are PFFD, EPRF, and PGF.
